lastReleaseMessage: chore: gitignore logs/ (watchdog heartbeat + relaunch log are operational state)

barRaise.topFinding: Fourth review, and the operational system stays green: clean tree, fresh heartbeat (server and tunnel both up), dashboard reads 1.0.0 matching the v1.0.0 tag, and the new-project flow has proven itself (allowlist grew to ten with Counselor and Skylight, both real on disk). What ends the back-to-back-clean streak is one concrete doc fix nobody circled back to when v1 shipped: README.md still says "Pre-1.0" and carries a June-15 turn-on checklist, while DESIGN.md, the dashboard JSON, and the in-app version pill all say v1.0.0 in daily use. It is the public GitHub landing page for a project whose section 24 plan is to let others clone and run it. The other two residuals from 2026-06-24 are unchanged (no commits since 2026-06-23): the watchdog infers tunnel health from cloudflared process existence rather than an edge probe, and the per-boot session secret drops the phone session on a watchdog relaunch. Both stay LOW; neither loses data nor exposes the machine.
